assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 51 of claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration' as a level-2 heading.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 53: '### Product Lifecycle'. Line 55: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle'. Line 56: 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT'. Line 57: 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200'. Line 58: 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:'. Line 59: 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'. All 5 fields present with exact expected values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Line 61: '### Version Streams'. Lines 63-65 contain a markdown table with headers 'Stream | Konflux Release Repo | Local Path | Security Matrix Path' and one data row: '2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Line 67: '### Source Repositories'. Lines 69-72 contain a markdown table with headers 'Repository | URL' and two rows: 'backend | https://github.com/example/backend' and 'frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, and Code Intelligence with Limitations
assertion_results.evidence: Line 18: '## Repository Registry' with a table of 2 repositories. Line 26: '## Jira Configuration' with all 5 Jira fields. Line 33: '## Code Intelligence' with tool prefix documentation. Line 48: '### Limitations' subsection listing serena_backend and serena_ui with no known limitations.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Line 28: 'User was asked whether to enable security triage: **accepted**'. Line 29: 'All Product Lifecycle fields collected from user (5 fields: product pages URL, Jira version prefix, vulnerability issue type ID, component label pattern, VEX justification custom field)'. Lines 30-31 document version streams and source repositories being configured.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: Line 3: 'All sections newly added (greenfield setup - no prior Project Configuration existed)'. Line 31: '## Security Configuration' with 'Section newly added with 3 subsections'. Lines 7, 14, 23 confirm Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, and Code Intelligence were also 'Section newly added'.
